summary: Iteration 91: Tested SoundBoard file attachment features, onboarding bug fix, and SQL migration files. Fixed critical bug in MySoundBoard.js (missing imports/state). Confirmed onboarding fix working. All 18 backend tests pass.

test_scope.credentials: test1234@outlook.com / test1234! (account is NOW calibrated - has persona_calibration_status=complete)

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Missing imports (Paperclip, FileText, Download from lucide-react), missing MONO constant, missing attachedFile useState, missing fileRef useRef. Without these, the page would crash at runtime.

FloatingSoundboard component is ORPHANED - not mounted/imported on any page. The implemented Paperclip + FileReader functionality in FloatingSoundboard.js is dead code. The actual SoundBoard on all dashboard pages uses SoundboardPanel.js which has data-testid=sb-upload (not soundboard-attach).

SoundboardPanel.js handleFileSelect is a stub - it does NOT read file content. It only adds a message 'File analysis will be available when document processing is connected'. The full FileReader implementation exists in FloatingSoundboard.js but that component is not used.

integration_issues.issue: MySoundBoard page redirects to /subscribe with 'Soundboard Chat requires a paid plan'. Test account (Free plan) cannot access /soundboard page. MySoundBoard.js UI cannot be verified via E2E testing with this account.

onboarding_fix.details: User redirected to /advisor (CALIBRATION ROUTING Decision: READY) instead of /calibration loop. persona_calibration_status=complete is set in onboarding.py lines 451-468.

migration_044.details: All 9+ required tables present: integration_health, integration_health_history, evidence_packs, cognition_decisions, outcome_checkpoints, propagation_rules, automation_actions, automation_executions, instability_snapshots, confidence_recalibrations

migration_045.details: ic_generate_cognition_contract function found at line 159. All core functions present: fn_assemble_evidence_pack, fn_compute_propagation_map, fn_snapshot_daily_instability, ic_generate_cognition_contract

soundboard_chat_text.details: SoundboardPanel.js chat works normally. Sent 'What is my biggest risk today?' - 2 message bubbles appeared. sb-input and sb-send work correctly.

soundboard_paperclip_sb_upload.details: SoundboardPanel.js (used on all dashboard pages) has Paperclip button with data-testid=sb-upload, visible=True. FILE UPLOAD IS A STUB though.

floating_soundboard_paperclip.details: FloatingSoundboard.js has Paperclip (soundboard-attach) and full FileReader logic in code. But the component is NOT imported or used on any page. The code exists but is dead code.

mysoundboard_paperclip.details: After my fix, MySoundBoard.js has Paperclip (soundboard-attach), FileText, Download imports, MONO constant, fileRef and attachedFile state. Page is gated by TierGate for paid plans so cannot test via E2E with free account.

soundboard_file_download_card.details: Both FloatingSoundboard.js and MySoundBoard.js have file download card rendering when response.data.file exists. Cannot test E2E as this requires backend to generate a file response.

action_items: CRITICAL: FloatingSoundboard.js is an ORPHANED component - not imported/used anywhere. Either (1) import it in DashboardLayout or relevant pages OR (2) merge its FileReader file attachment logic into SoundboardPanel.js. The data-testid=soundboard-attach is only in FloatingSoundboard.js which is dead code.

MEDIUM: SoundboardPanel.js handleFileSelect is a stub - only shows a message, doesn't actually read file content. The full FileReader implementation needs to be ported from FloatingSoundboard.js to SoundboardPanel.js.
INFO: MySoundBoard (/soundboard) page requires paid plan (TierGate). Cannot E2E test with free test account. The code is now fixed but UI testing requires a paid plan account.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: FloatingSoundboard.js implements full file attachment with FileReader but is imported NOWHERE. grep confirms: only file that references it is FloatingSoundboard.js itself. All dashboard pages use SoundboardPanel.js which has a stub file upload.
MySoundBoard.js was missing Paperclip, FileText, Download imports + MONO constant + fileRef + attachedFile state - would crash on render. FIXED.
SoundboardPanel.js handleFileSelect stub (lines 125-130) does not use FileReader - just adds a hardcoded message. The real implementation is in FloatingSoundboard.js but not used.
The onboarding.py fix (lines 451-468) correctly sets persona_calibration_status=complete with both UPDATE (existing profile) and INSERT (new profile) branches - well implemented.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/MySoundBoard.js (Added: Paperclip, FileText, Download imports + MONO constant + fileRef useRef + attachedFile useState)

success_rate.frontend: 75% (SoundBoard chat works, Paperclip visible in SoundboardPanel; FloatingSoundboard orphaned; MySoundBoard behind TierGate)

test_credentials: test1234@outlook.com / test1234! (Free plan, calibration complete, redirects to /advisor)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 found: (1) MySoundBoard.js had critical missing imports/state - FIXED. (2) FloatingSoundboard.js is orphaned - not used on any page. The actual soundboard is SoundboardPanel.js with data-testid=sb-upload for Paperclip. (3) SoundboardPanel.js file upload is a stub. (4) test1234 account IS calibrated (READY) and goes to /advisor. (5) /soundboard page requires paid plan (TierGate).

mysoundboard_bug.root_cause: MySoundBoard.js was enhanced with file attachment feature but the developer forgot to add required imports (Paperclip, FileText, Download from lucide-react), MONO font constant, and React state/ref hooks (attachedFile useState, fileRef useRef).
mysoundboard_bug.reproduction: Navigate to /soundboard page (requires paid plan) - would crash with 'Paperclip is not defined' or 'attachedFile is not defined' errors
mysoundboard_bug.mitigation: Fixed: Added missing imports at line 7-13 and state/ref declarations at line 30-31 in MySoundBoard.js

floating_soundboard_orphaned.root_cause: FloatingSoundboard.js was created as a new component but never imported into any page or layout. The dashboard layout uses SoundboardPanel.js instead.
floating_soundboard_orphaned.reproduction: grep -rn 'FloatingSoundboard' /app/frontend/src shows it's only referenced in its own file
floating_soundboard_orphaned.mitigation: E1 needs to either import FloatingSoundboard into DashboardLayout (replacing SoundboardPanel) or merge FileReader logic into SoundboardPanel.js

mocked_apis_list: /api/cognition/{tab} - still returns MIGRATION_REQUIRED until 044+045 run in Supabase SQL Editor
mocked_api_confirmation.impact: Cognition panels gracefully fall back as confirmed in iteration 90
